featuredWork.title: Hybrid AI Agent System
featuredWork.description: 7 specialist agents orchestrated to replace manual PM workflows — procurement, compliance, reporting — running under €30/month on commodity cloud infrastructure.

featuredWork.title: EU Regulatory Workflow Automation
featuredWork.description: GDPR-compliant document processing pipeline built for German enterprise. Reduced manual review time by automating extraction, classification, and audit trail generation.

featuredWork.title: Enterprise Programme Delivery — GfK / Teradata
featuredWork.description: Led cross-functional delivery of analytics platform migrations across 12 markets. 22 years of enterprise PM discipline distilled into repeatable AI-assisted delivery frameworks.
